name: Dreamcast
description: Sega's 128-bit home console platform, known for arcade conversions, online features, VMU support, and Sega's final first-party console library.

eras.title: Launch and Arcade Conversion Era
eras.description: Early period built around Sega arcade conversions, online ambitions, and the system's Japanese and western launches.

eras.title: Final Sega Console Era
eras.description: Late period where Sega's first-party creativity peaks before the company exits console hardware.
